Comment: He's a chill average professor. Not engaging in lectures as he's clearly disinterested in teaching. Grade leniently. Pop-quizzes, HWs, 2 Projects, a midterm and a Final. Allows one-sides cheat sheet for exams. Easy to get A if you just do the work due. Programming HWs and projects can take some time figuring as he doesn't cover either in class.
Tags: Clear grading criteria, Beware of pop quizzes, Lecture heavy

Comment: Basically, the work is hard; more engineering than computer science. All lecture info is on slides, available online. Homeworks are balanced: not too easy but not insane. Projects are annoying, though, as he never covers the material that you'll need. (Hint: familiarize yourself with Socket Programming in C). Not a bad professor, but not the best.
